title: rosa × suberecta var. shoolbredii
intro: Rosa × suberecta var. shoolbredii, also known as Rosa Rugosa 'Shoolbredii', is a compact and fragrant variant of the Rugosa rose, a hybrid of Rosa rugosa and Rosa × suberecta. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rosa × suberecta var. shoolbredii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its flowers, leaves, and stems can be used to create a range of herbal preparations.
